title: delivery: signing error silently discarded in process_batch
description: delivery.rs:231: the match arm is 'Err(_e) =>' — the error is bound to _e but not logged. The tracing::error\! call uses a string literal without including the error value. Diagnostic information about why signing failed is lost. Fix: log the error with 'error = %_e' or rename to 'e' and include it.
